name: The Binder
description: A local knowledge base and connection engine. Drop in notes, documents, and links. Kart finds what goes with what. Your NotebookLM replacement — private, local, yours.
author: USER

data_streams.purpose: Store the knowledge chunks you add to your binder
data_streams.description: Your notes and documents, stored locally in willow_knowledge.db

data_streams.purpose: Track people, places, and concepts mentioned across your knowledge
data_streams.description: The relationship graph — who goes with what

data_streams.purpose: Remember what you were looking at during this session
data_streams.description: Cleared when you close The Binder

notes: The Binder backend lives in the Willow server (server.py). This manifest describes the app-level contract. Run via: python Willow/server.py, then open binder.html.
